name: Gobhi Mung
recipeIngredient: 1/3 small Head cauliflower cut into florets
2 each Green chilies, seeded and shredded
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the mung beans.
2. Place them in a deep pot with chopped onions, grated ginger, minced garlic, turmeric, and 3 cups of water. Bring to a boil.
3. Simmer for 15 minutes.
4. Add the potatoes, cauliflower, salt, and another 2 cups of water. Cook for an additional 15 minutes.
5. Heat ghee over high heat until very hot. Add cumin seeds and fry until they turn dark brown.
6. Add the green chilies (seeded and shredded) and red pepper flakes, stirring briefly.
7. Pour the contents into the pot with the mung beans, potatoes, and cauliflower.
8. Add lemon juice and chopped coriander leaves. Mix well.
9. Serve with plain cooked rice.
